rule: All services must be independently deployable
rationale: Enable faster release cycles and reduce blast radius
legacyViolation: All services tightly coupled to central database

rule: All API endpoints must require JWT authentication
rationale: Prevent unauthorized access and ensure audit trail
migratedApproach: OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect with JWT tokens

rule: API response time must be <200ms for 95th percentile
rationale: Meet modern user expectations and SLA requirements
legacyViolation: Average API latency 500ms due to N+1 queries
migratedApproach: Optimized queries, caching layer (Redis), async processing

rule: All PII must be encrypted at rest and in transit
rationale: Compliance with GDPR/CCPA and data protection regulations
legacyViolation: Plain text storage of user emails and phone numbers
migratedApproach: AES-256 encryption with key management service

rule: Minimum 80% code coverage for critical paths
rationale: Reduce production incidents and ensure quality
legacyViolation: <5% test coverage with manual QA only
migratedApproach: Comprehensive unit/integration tests with CI/CD gates
